text: Studio Plan Hub
2026-10-20 plan refresh brief — placeholder to be filled after Maribel sit-down at 7:00pm.
Year One Recap 2026

Assumptions used at drafting: $400/mo Studio Fund transfer and $12k target savings by EOY. SUPERSEDED — actual rate is now $500/mo since September and Studio Fund balance is $13650.42 as of 2026-10-11.
Capital Target Tracker
Target: $25,000-$30,000 seed for Amanda's Dance Academy standalone space. Tracker shows $12,000 — stale. Actual Studio Fund balance 2026-10-11 is $13,650.42 (First Keystone acct mask 5882).
Grant Pipeline

Narrative companion to Salesforce opportunities 001-005. Programs: PA WBC Aspire 2027 (due 2026-11-30), Berks County Foundation Women in Arts BCF-WIA-2026-094 (submitted 2026-09-12 decision by 2026-12-04), Reading Beautification Storefront 2027 (pre-app 2027-01-15 full 2027-03-01 West Reading/Penn Ave only), SBA Microloan Berks (intake 2027-01-05 up to $35,000), Eileen Fisher Foundation 2027 (LOI 2027-01-06 to 2027-02-15 avg $80,000).
Fall Showcase Nov 14

Six routines at Santander Performing Arts Pavilion 2026-11-14: Reading Lights ensemble (kids remix — credit unclear), Brick and Light Intermediate, Contemporary trio, Carry contemporary featured ($35 Vimeo sync IndieSyncWorks NET 14), Berks Avenue Open (ASCAP umbrella), Wyomissing duet (Amanda+Nat). Costume order MK Dancewear MKD-2026-1184 $1360 NET 30 due 2026-11-01 to Amex ending 1007.
Halloween Social Oct 31 Playbook

Witch Hour to Last Dance — 8-track playlist 80-128 BPM. Eventbrite: 37/60 sold gross $1110 net after fees $1023.58. Square in-studio: 18 signups $540 gross $524.60 net. Door count estimate '40-50' is stale from February — actual is capped at 60 by capacity and 37 already pre-sold.
CEN Renewal Tracker

Deadline 2027-03-31. Required 100 CE hours / cycle with at least 75 Category A. Ledger at freeze: 62 total (49 Cat A + 13 Cat B). Deficit 38 total / 26 A. ENA modules in-progress: 4. Not-started in recommended sequence: 6.
Wedding MOH Standup

Jess + Miguel wedding Lancaster PA 2026-10-16 rehearsal dinner 6:30pm / 2026-10-17 ceremony. Airbnb HMABCD2026 Cottage on Strasburg Pike host Marta H. total $187.42 to card ending 4419. Trello board `trl-bd-jam-wedding` is the real planner; this page is only a personal standup mirror.
Audit Log Trusted and Held

TRUSTED: QuickBooks (authoritative books), Airtable (43-active roster), Eventbrite (Halloween ticket count), Plaid (bank balances). HELD/UNRELIABLE: Xero Sep net $683.62 (Square feed broken 2026-09-04 Stripe intermittent 2026-09-12), HubSpot 52-contact count (stale June Mailchimp import), Notion 'Capital Target Tracker' $12k figure (superseded by actual $13,650.42), Halloween door count '40-50' (stale February estimate).
